header.title: MedPharmChex
header.subtitle: Drug interaction checker backed by FDA data

search.hint: Enter 2–5 medications to check for interactions

result.adverse_events: {{count}} adverse event reports in the FDA FAERS database for these medications
result.disclaimer: This tool provides information only. Always consult a healthcare provider before changing medications.

error.not_found: Could not find one or more drugs in the RxNorm database. Check your spelling.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Make sure the backend server is running on port 3001.
error.network: Connection error. Check your internet and try again.
error.api: Data service unavailable. Try again in a moment.

footer: Data sources: NIH RxNorm · FDA FAERS · Anthropic Claude

audio.safe: {{drugs}} can be taken together. This combination is safe.
audio.caution: Warning. {{drugs}} may interact. Talk to your pharmacist or doctor before taking these together.
audio.dangerous: STOP. Do not take {{drugs}} together. This combination is dangerous. Call your doctor or pharmacist right now.
